_note: Percentages are ESTIMATES. Calibrate against Settings > Usage in Claude and tune the budgets below (in tokens: input+output+cache).
_weeklyReset: To show 'resets in Xd Yh' for the week: take the 'Resets in ...' from the official panel, add it to the current time, and put it here in ISO. e.g. '2026-06-19T03:00:00'. Leave null to use a rolling 7-day window.
_alerts: macOS notification when session/week cross these thresholds (%).
